Sign In

Parul University · Vadodara, Gujarat

Centre of Future Skills

Lakshay 2047 is Parul University's flagship innovation ecosystem — 14 specialised labs, one campus, and a singular goal: producing the technologists who will define India's next era.

Mission

Equip students with hands-on, industry-grade skills across emerging disciplines — bridging academia and real-world innovation.

Innovation

Every lab is purpose-built for its discipline: from bioreactors to motion-capture rigs, students work with professional-grade equipment.

Collaboration

Cross-disciplinary teams define Lakshay 2047. AI researchers work beside designers, hardware engineers alongside media creators.

Vision 2047

Named after India's centenary of independence, Lakshay 2047 is a commitment to building the talent that will shape the next 25 years.

14 Labs · 8 Disciplines

Each lab is a dedicated environment for its domain — not a shared general-purpose room.

AI / ML
Robotics
Design
Hardware
Media
XR
Cybersecurity
Biotech

Explore the labs

Browse all 14 labs, check availability, and book your next session.
